allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "done")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./vendor/three/three.module.js'\).then\(m=>{const T=m; const v=new T.Vector3\(1,2,3\); console.log\('THREE OK, Vector3 length:', v.length\(\).toFixed\(4\), 'Raycaster?', typeof T.Raycaster, 'Mesh?', typeof T.Mesh, 'CircleGeometry?', typeof T.CircleGeometry\);}\).catch\(e=>console.log\('THREE IMPORT FAILED:', e.message\)\);")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('three'\).then\(m=>console.log\('bare three resolves in Node:', typeof m.Raycaster\)\).catch\(e=>console.log\('FAIL',e.message\)\)")
Bash(git commit -m 'Stage C1: WebRTC plumbing — server/client pages, localStorage signaling, echo test *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Stage C2: pose metadata sync — frameId pixel tag + pose ring buffer *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Stage C3: the warp goes over the network — client reprojects the stream *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Stage C4: network simulation — delay buffer, input delay, jitter switch *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Stage C5: measurement, live chart, CSV export with per-mode stats *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Stage C6: README — cloud demo docs, study order, demo script, honest tables *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Update local settings allowlist \(session permission entries\) *)

PowerShell(node bench/run.js --synth wander --seed 7 --duration 5000 --out bench/out/a.csv; node bench/run.js --synth wander --seed 7 --duration 5000 --out bench/out/b.csv; if \(\(Get-FileHash bench/out/a.csv\).Hash -eq \(Get-FileHash bench/out/b.csv\).Hash\) { 'IDENTICAL across runs' } else { 'MISMATCH' }; node bench/run.js --sweep-velocity 100:240:10 | Select-Object -Last 6)

PowerShell($cred = "protocol=https`nhost=github.com`n" | git credential fill; $token = \($cred | Where-Object { $_ -match '^password=' }\) -replace '^password=',''; if \($token\) { $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; Accept = 'application/vnd.github+json' }; $existing = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.github.com/repos/Turbo-Soggy/Reflex2WebFrameWarp/pulls?head=Turbo-Soggy:cloud-stream&state=open' -Headers $headers; if \($existing.Count -gt 0\) { "EXISTING: $\($existing[0].html_url\)" } else { 'no existing PR; token OK' } } else { 'no token from credential helper' })
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('html_url'\) or json.dumps\(d\)[:800]\)")
